files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections from the Guide Lessons portion of the magazine, including Editorial content, Theology lesson on Baptism for the Dead, Genealogy lesson on Approximating Dates, and Home Ethics/Art lesson on Economy. The file also contains conference information and various administrative content mixed with the lessons.

files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections merged together - a Genealogy lesson on approximating dates, a Home Ethics lesson on economy, an Art lesson referencing 'Devotees and their Shrines', and a health article on colds. The last section includes advertisements and appears to run to the end of the file content.
